item.title: LEGO Classic Medium Creative Brick Box 10696 Building Toy Set - Featuring Storage Includes Train Car and a Tiger Figure and Playset for Kids Boys and Girls Ages 4-99

item.title: LEGO Marvel Endgame Final Battle 76266 Build and Display Avengers Model Collectible Playset with 6 Minifigures Including Captain Marvel Gift Idea for Christmas for Teen Boys Girls and Marvel Fans
item.description: You can find LEGO Marvel Endgame Final Battle 76266 Build and Display Avengers Model Collectible Playset with 6 Minifigures Including Captain Marvel Gift Idea for Christmas for Teen Boys Girls and Marvel Fans with a discount here: ℹ️: Avengers battle action – LEGO Marvel Endgame Final Battle (76266) recreates the decisive showdown at the end of Marvel Studios’ Avengers: Endgame with classic characters in an inspiring setting Many ways to play – There are lots of places to attach the minifigures around the highly detailed, 360-degree battleground, which also reconfigures to a more shelf-friendly, linear design Hidden surprises – Iconic items from the Marvel Avengers movies are concealed within the Marvel collectible for kids to discover: Captain Americas Shield, Thors hammer, the Time Stone and the portal-opening rat Famous minifigures – The Marvel playset includes Captain Marvel, Okoye, Wanda Maximoff, Shuri and Valkyrie minifigures, plus a Thanos big figure and The Wasp microfigure Marvel fan gift idea – Give this multifaceted playset as a birthday, holiday or any-day gift to a young Super Hero aged 10 and up 🛒 Buy it!
